name: gestorpedidos-soaco
description: Gestor de Pedidos — interno: 5180, externo: 5174, API: 4000.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,fe,watchdog -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:wait-fe" "node scripts/watchdog-backend.cjs"
scripts.dev:wait-fe: wait-on -t 45000 http://127.0.0.1:4000/health && concurrently -n interno,externo -c green,yellow "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:frontend:externo"
scripts.dev:full: npm install && npm run dev:full:backend && npm run dev:full:frontend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full:backend: npm install --prefix backend && npm run generate --prefix backend
